stemHtml: What will happen if you fly with the maximum ratio between thrust available and thrust required during a climb?

options.a: You will fly with maximum rate of climb.
options.b: You will fly at a speed lower than V<sub>X</sub>.
options.c: You will fly with the maximum angle of climb for all aircraft.
options.d: You will fly at a speed higher than V<sub>Y</sub>.
